page: UpCloud HIMEM-24xCPU-512GB is a memory-optimized virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7543 processor running at 2.0 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.33 GB per core. The CPU allocation is shared, and the architecture is x86_64. The server includes a bundled 700 GB local SSD for storage and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in specific areas. The server achieves top 25% results in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU performance, as well as multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU physics tests. Memory write bandwidth for large blocks is also strong, though read-only memory bandwidth and general Geekbench scores fall within the average range. Tradeoffs include a shared CPU allocation and average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and LLM inference.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this server offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads without the premium of dedicated CPU allocations. It is well-suited for memory-intensive applications such as large-scale caching, in-memory databases, data processing pipelines, and heavy multi-threaded decompression tasks.
description: UpCloud HIMEM-24xCPU-512GB is a memory-optimized virtual server running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an AMD EPYC 7543 processor offering 24 vCPUs at 2.0 GHz, 512.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 700 GB local SSD. With a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.33 GB per core, this x86_64 system is designed for memory-intensive workloads. Benchmark data shows strong performance in stress-ng CPU tests, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and large-block memory write bandwidth, while general database and memory read operations perform in the average tier. The shared CPU allocation presents a tradeoff for sustained compute-heavy tasks, but provides a cost-efficient profile for high-density memory configurations. This server is best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing.
og_description: UpCloud HIMEM-24xCPU-512GB is a memory-optimized KVM virtual server configured with 24 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and a 700 GB local SSD, delivering strong multi-core and memory write performance.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual server featuring AMD EPYC processors and local SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 24 AMD EPYC 7543 vCPUs with a shared CPU allocation
512 GB of system memory providing 21.33 GB per core
700 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Strong performance in multi-core CPU and memory write benchmarks
Designed for in-memory databases, caching, and data processing
